outlook.volatilityExpectation: Elevated volatility expected: negative GEX environment with spot at gamma flip zone amplifies price movements

Significant structural Call OI in MONTHLY_1 (496) and MONTHLY_2 (827). Long-term support level for extended moves.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Elevated short-term volatility due to mixed GEX; spot at critical gamma inflection point
outlook.summary: Spot exactly at gamma flip equilibrium. Unusual data structure with most strikes significantly below spot. Limited resistance above; 7190 only PUT level visible. Strong CALL concentrations at 6550-6650 create downward magnet effect.

levels.motivazione: Spot price exactly at gamma equilibrium across 0DTE, WEEKLY_1, and WEEKLY_2. Critical inflection point for directional movement. Dealers neutral gamma here.

Highest CALL OI (218) in MONTHLY_1. Strong structural support zone ~4.8% below spot. Primary downside magnet level.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Elevated - negative GEX profile amplifies directional moves. Expect acceleration on break of 24900 or 25000.

Monthly_1 call interest (45 vol) below spot. Limited support in weak put structure.
